synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-2182 Important: Oracle Linux 10 libsoup3 security update
description:
[3.6.5-9]
- Fix CVE-2026-0719

[3.6.5-8]
- Fix CVE-2025-14523

[3.6.5-7]
- Add patch for CVE-2025-12105

[3.6.5-6]
- Fix integer overflow in date/time parsing

[3.6.5-5]
- Bump revision number

[3.6.5-4]
- Fix several CVEs
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-2182

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-2182.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libsoup3-3.6.5-3.el10_1.9.x86_64.rpm
libsoup3-devel-3.6.5-3.el10_1.9.x86_64.rpm
libsoup3-doc-3.6.5-3.el10_1.9.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
libsoup3-3.6.5-3.el10_1.9.aarch64.rpm
libsoup3-devel-3.6.5-3.el10_1.9.aarch64.rpm
libsoup3-doc-3.6.5-3.el10_1.9.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/libsoup3-3.6.5-3.el10_1.9.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2026-0719
CVE-2026-1761




Description of changes:

[3.6.5-9]
- Fix CVE-2026-0719

[3.6.5-8]
- Fix CVE-2025-14523

[3.6.5-7]
- Add patch for CVE-2025-12105

[3.6.5-6]
- Fix integer overflow in date/time parsing

[3.6.5-5]
- Bump revision number

[3.6.5-4]
- Fix several CVEs
